name: PCCOOLER CPS KN1000 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 1000W PSU, Native 12V-2x6 Connector, ATX 3.1 & PCIe 5.1 Ready, Dual CPU Power Cables, 105°C Rated Japanese Capacitors, P3-KN1000-G1F and PCCOOLER CPS DA360 Pro ARGB Digital AIO CPU Liquid Cooler, 360mm Radiator, 300W TDP, 270° Rotatable Digital Display, Infinity Halo ARGB Effect, for Intel LGA 1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, White
shortName: PCCOOLER CPS KN1000 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 1000W
description: Bundle combining a 1000W 80 PLUS Gold fully modular power supply with a 360mm AIO liquid CPU cooler featuring 270° rotatable digital display, designed for high-end PC builds.
